first_contact: SWM JHI / SWM AEE for division
escalation_1: Zonal SE SWM / City Corporation Health Officer
notes: Use SWM JHI when ward mapping exists; otherwise use SWM AEE by division.

cc: Chief Engineer; Deputy Commissioner of City Corporation
notes: Use City Corporation contact where ward-specific engineer is not available.

first_contact: Ward engineer / AEE; SWD Superintendent Engineer
cc: Chief Engineer SWD; Health Officer if sewage/health risk
sla: Immediate for flooding; 48 hours for inspection
notes: If sewage is involved, also route to BWSSB.

first_contact: BESCOM AE/JE or service station from BESCOM sheet
escalation_2: BESCOM senior office / consumer grievance forum
notes: Ward mapping is inferred from locality text in BESCOM data; verify before dispatch.

first_contact: Traffic Police Station / PIO or PI
sla: 24-72 hours for response; longer for infrastructure changes
notes: Traffic PS boundaries do not exactly match wards.

sla: 24 hours for sewage overflow; 48-72 hours for water supply complaints
notes: BWSSB mapping is by service station/locality name from uploaded BWSSB data.
Use city corporation Health Officer from contact matrix when ward MOH unavailable.

first_contact: BBMP Lakes Executive Engineer / Chief Engineer Lakes
political: MLA; MP for major environmental issue
notes: Use BBMP email directory for Chief Engineer Lakes and Executive Engineer Lakes.

category: Property tax / revenue / khata / ward admin
cc: Deputy Commissioner Revenue / City Corporation DC
political: Councillor only if local facilitation needed
notes: Use BBMP email directory for Revenue Officers / AROs.
Evidence-heavy complaint; attach photos, geotag, property/address details.
